k_anonymity.metric_description_report: Evaluates K-Anonymity over quasi-identifiers (each equivalence class must have at least k records).

age_cv.metric_description_report: Measures disparity in selection rates across sensitive groups conditioned on another variable.

competences_coverage_required.metric_description_report: Measures disparity in selection rates across sensitive groups conditioned on another variable.

age_cv.metric_description_report: Accuracy parity across sensitive groups, computed only on samples with positive predictions (ŷ=1).

competences_coverage_required.metric_description_report: Accuracy parity across sensitive groups, computed only on samples with positive predictions (ŷ=1).

age_cv.metric_description_report: Measures demographic parity by computing selection rate differences across sensitive groups.
